calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-31-2013 Dismissal - Appeal Abandoned

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-10-2013 Continued To Aug-15-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: 9:04am

Judge Pro Tem David Porter, clerk Jean Kong, nothing reported, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Nancy Robison appears in pro per; Respondent, Benjamin Kuhm appears in pro per. Parties previously sworn. Both parties request a continuance from the judge. The case continue to August 15, 2013. Informed the parties that they will receive a notice of continuance from the court.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-15-2013 Judgment Entered
